languages.text: {n}От долгого взгляда на ворота к горлу начинает подкатывать легкая тошнота. Резьба кажется потусторонней, а мерцание немного гипнотизирует: кажется, что стоит коснуться врат рукой — и она пройдет сквозь них.{/n}

{n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}От долгого взгляда на ворота к горлу начинает подкатывать легкая тошнота. Резьба кажется потусторонней, а мерцание немного гипнотизирует: кажется, что стоит коснуться врат рукой — и она пройдет сквозь них.{/n}

{n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

{n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

languages.text: {n}門をじっと見つめていると、吐き気がするような感覚がする。彫刻は異様な美しさで、光る表面はわずかに催眠作用がある。もし手を伸ばしてこの門に触れたら、手はそのまま通り抜けてしまうような気がする。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}門をじっと見つめていると、吐き気がするような感覚がする。彫刻は異様な美しさで、光る表面はわずかに催眠作用がある。もし手を伸ばしてこの門に触れたら、手はそのまま通り抜けてしまうような気がする。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mientras miras la puerta, empiezas a notar una sensación incómoda. Las tallas parecen sobrenaturales, con un brillo ligeramente hipnótico. Tienes la sensación de que, si tocaras la puerta con la mano, la atravesarías.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mientras miras la puerta, empiezas a notar una sensación incómoda. Las tallas parecen sobrenaturales, con un brillo ligeramente hipnótico. Tienes la sensación de que, si tocaras la puerta con la mano, la atravesarías.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du empfindest Ekel, als deine Augen auf dem Tor ruhen. Das Schimmern der offenbar außerweltlichen Schnitzereien hat etwas Hypnotisches. Du hast das Gefühl, wenn du das Tor mit deiner Hand berührst, wird sie es einfach durchdringen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du empfindest Ekel, als deine Augen auf dem Tor ruhen. Das Schimmern der offenbar außerweltlichen Schnitzereien hat etwas Hypnotisches. Du hast das Gefühl, wenn du das Tor mit deiner Hand berührst, wird sie es einfach durchdringen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous sentez votre cœur se soulever alors que votre regard s'attarde sur le portail. Les gravures surnaturelles scintillent de manière envoûtante. Vous avez l'impression que si vous tendiez la main, elle traverserait le portail sans effort.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous sentez votre cœur se soulever alors que votre regard s'attarde sur le portail. Les gravures surnaturelles scintillent de manière envoûtante. Vous avez l'impression que si vous tendiez la main, elle traverserait le portail sans effort.{/n}

languages.text: {n}目光在门扉上停留越久，你越是感到腹中恶心翻涌。这些雕刻看起来并非凡俗之物，闪烁的微光带着些许催眠效果。你隐约感觉到，如果用手触碰这扇大门，手掌会直接穿门而过。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You feel your gorge begin to rise as your eyes linger on the gate. The carvings seem otherworldly, and the shimmering is slightly hypnotic: you feel as though, were you to touch the gate with your hand, it would pass straight through.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gözlerin kapının üzerinde gezindikçe midenin kalktığını hissediyorsun. Oymalar dünya dışı görünüyor, parıltı ise hafifçe hipnotize edici... Sanki elinle kapıya dokunsan doğrudan içinden geçip gidecekmiş gibi hissediyorsun.{/n}
